modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help with smart classroom tech for video conference.

full_description_text: 
The user called in needing help with the smart classroom tech. They were trying to start a video conference but couldn't get it to work. They mentioned it was in the USD-SF classroom.
short_description: Need help with smart classroom tech for video conference.
description: The user called in needing help with the smart classroom tech. They were trying to start a video conference but couldn't get it to work. They mentioned it was in the USD-SF classroom.
